product.name: Shrinky-Dink Compression
product.tagline: Lossless feedback compression for modern product teams
taglinesAlt: Turn product noise into structured signal
Capture feedback. Reduce chaos. Ship with clarity.
Structure what users say into what teams need
product.positioning: Shrinky-Dink Compression helps teams capture, structure, and act on product feedback across applications, documentation, and support channels.

navigation.footerNote: Shrinky-Dink Compression. Built for teams that prefer signal over noise.
navigation.footerMicro: Some feedback may have been optimised for clarity.

hero.title: Shrinky-Dink Compression
hero.subtitle: Lossless feedback compression for modern product teams
hero.body: Capture, structure, and reduce product feedback into actionable insight. Designed for teams that want clarity without adding process overhead.

whatItDoes.title: Turn feedback into structured signal
whatItDoes.body: Product feedback is often fragmented, duplicated, and lacking context. Shrinky-Dink Compression provides a simple way to capture high fidelity input and transform it into something your team can actually use.

features.title: Capture feedback anywhere
features.body: Collect feedback from forms, documentation, and product surfaces without forcing users into rigid workflows.

features.title: Add context automatically
features.body: Attach page, environment, and session context to every submission to reduce follow-up and guesswork.

features.title: Reduce duplication
features.body: Group and structure similar feedback to avoid repeated analysis and wasted effort.

features.title: Developer-friendly integration
features.body: Minimal setup with predictable patterns that fit naturally into modern applications.

howItWorks: Capture input from your application or documentation
Structure and enrich feedback with context
Route signals into your internal workflows
stats: 94 percent reduction in duplicate reports (internally estimated)

cta.title: Start capturing better feedback
cta.body: Integrate once and begin collecting structured feedback across your entire product surface.

featuresPage.title: Features
featuresPage.intro: Shrinky-Dink Compression is designed to capture high fidelity feedback and turn it into structured, actionable insight with minimal effort.

items.title: Feedback capture
items.body: Collect feedback from contact forms, documentation pages, and embedded product surfaces using simple, flexible inputs.

items.title: Context enrichment
items.body: Automatically include page location, environment, and metadata so every submission arrives with useful context.

items.title: Signal structuring
items.body: Transform unstructured input into consistent formats that can be triaged and analysed efficiently.

items.title: Lightweight triage
items.body: Organise incoming feedback into manageable streams without introducing heavy workflow tools.

items.title: Multi-channel input
items.body: Capture feedback from multiple sources while maintaining a single structured pipeline.

items.title: Minimal integration surface
items.body: Integrate quickly using predictable patterns that align with modern frontend frameworks.

cta.title: See how it fits into your stack

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Have a question, need support, or want to explore integration options? Send us a message and we will respond as soon as possible.

fields.name: Your name
fields.message: Provide as much detail as possible. Include context where relevant.

notes.response: Most enquiries receive a response within one business day.
notes.tip: For technical issues, including steps to reproduce and expected behaviour will help us respond faster.

index.title: Documentation
index.intro: This documentation outlines how to integrate Shrinky-Dink Compression into your application and begin capturing structured feedback signals.

pages.title: Getting Started
pages.description: Learn the basics of integrating feedback capture into your application.

pages.title: SDK Setup
pages.description: Configure the integration layer and customise behaviour.

pages.title: Troubleshooting
pages.description: Resolve common issues and edge cases.

index.note: All examples are framework-agnostic and designed to minimise integration complexity.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.intro: This guide walks through the minimal steps required to begin capturing structured feedback within your application.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body: Shrinky-Dink Compression provides a lightweight integration model that allows you to capture user input and enrich it with contextual data.

sections.title: Install
sections.body: Add the client integration to your application using your preferred package manager.

sections.title: Initialise
sections.body: Initialise the client with your project configuration.

sections.title: Capture feedback
sections.body: Trigger feedback capture from your UI components or forms.

gettingStarted.callout: Keep payloads simple. Context will be enriched automatically where possible.

sdkSetup.title: SDK Setup
sdkSetup.intro: Configure the integration layer to control how feedback is captured, structured, and transmitted.

sections.title: Configuration
sections.body: Define your project settings and any required metadata.

sections.title: Custom fields
sections.body: Extend payloads with additional structured fields relevant to your application.

sections.title: UI integration
sections.body: Embed feedback triggers within your application interface.

sdkSetup.callout: Avoid over-collecting data. Focus on capturing high signal input.

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshooting.intro: This section covers common issues and recommended resolutions when integrating Shrinky-Dink Compression.

issues.title: Feedback not submitting
issues.resolution: Verify client initialisation and required payload fields.

issues.title: Missing context data
issues.resolution: Ensure integration is initialised correctly and context capture is enabled.

issues.title: Duplicate submissions
issues.resolution: Check that events are not being triggered multiple times.

troubleshooting.cta: Still having issues? Contact support with full context.

about.title: About Shrinky-Dink Compression
about.intro: Shrinky-Dink Compression was created to address a common problem in modern product teams: feedback is everywhere, but insight is not.

sections.title: The problem
sections.body: Teams receive input from multiple channels including support, documentation, and in-product interactions. This feedback is often duplicated, incomplete, or missing context.

sections.title: The approach
sections.body: Shrinky-Dink Compression focuses on capturing high fidelity input and structuring it into consistent, actionable signals without adding unnecessary process.

sections.title: Who it is for
sections.body: Designed for product teams, developers, and organisations that value clarity, efficiency, and evidence-based decision making.

about.closing: Clear direction starts with structured feedback.
